query:
INSERT INTO report_rate_limits (user_id, is_blocked, blocked_until_at, block_reason, created_ts, updated_ts)
            VALUES ($1, TRUE, $2, $3, $4, $4)
            ON CONFLICT (user_id) DO UPDATE SET
                is_blocked = TRUE,
                blocked_until_at = $2,
                block_reason = $3,
                updated_ts = $4
